name: worksheet-save
_note: mental-health.worksheet-save persists a CBT/DBT worksheet (thought_record / cognitive_reframe / dbt_check_facts / dbt_opposite_action) into the per-user in-memory substrate. FAIL-CLOSED: unknown templateId rejects ('unknown worksheet template'); a worksheet with zero filled fields rejects ('at least one field must be filled in'); only known template field keys are persisted, each length-capped to 1000 chars (no unbounded injection sink). The clinical scaffolding (field labels/modality) is authored, evidence-based template metadata — NOT fabricated user content; the user's responses are the only stored data. Pinned by server/tests/mental-health-lens-macros.test.js. Lens-action domain — not assassin-enumerable via runMacro.
